creator: grahamperrin@freebsd.org
text:
At <https://download.freebsd.org/ftp/releases/VM-IMAGES/13.1-RELEASE/riscv64/Latest/>

CHECKSUM.SHA256 is listed with size 475, however 
<https://download.freebsd.org/ftp/releases/VM-IMAGES/13.1-RELEASE/riscv64/Latest/CHECKSUM.SHA256> is: 

    404 not found

CHECKSUM.SHA512 begins with a listing for: 

    FreeBSD-13.1-RELEASE-riscv-riscv64.qcow2.xz

----

At <https://www.freebsd.org/releases/13.1R/signatures/#_virtual_machine_image_checksums>

<CHECKSUM.SHA256-FreeBSD-13.1-RELEASE-riscv-riscv64-vm.asc> and <https://www.freebsd.org/releases/13.1R/checksums/CHECKSUM.SHA512-FreeBSD-13.1-RELEASE-riscv-riscv64-vm.asc> begin with a listing for a different file (without risc in the name): 

    FreeBSD-13.1-RELEASE-arm64-aarch64.qcow2.xz
